title: The Great Cake Caper
cover_description: Melody stands cross-eyed with a giant chocolate cake smashed over their entire face, frosting dripping down.
host_intro: Tonight, Melody tries to steal a cake. The cake fights back.
host_outro: Melody is wearing the cake. The cake is winning.
script:
[TITLE: The Great Cake Caper]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Melody tries to steal a cake. The cake fights back.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Melody is wearing the cake. The cake is winning.]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: villain_fails]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: confident, excited] I see a big round cake on the table. [STING: buildup_short]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: triumphant] It’s chocolate! My favorite! [STING: musical_flourish]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: smug] Nobody’s looking. Time to sneak. [STING: tiptoe]

[BEAT_1]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] My hand touches the plate... and the cake wobbles! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] Oh no! It’s sliding toward the edge! [STING: slide_whistle]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: panicked] I grab it—SPLAT! Frosting on my nose! [STING: splat]

[BEAT_2]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: defensive] Okay, okay, I’ll try again. [STING: tiptoe]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: suspicious] My fingers wiggle closer... the cake jiggles back! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: desperate] I poke it—BOING! Now it’s bouncing! [STING: big_crash]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: stunned] It bounced right onto my head! [STING: splat]

[BEAT_3]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: quiet, tentative] One last try. I’ll be sneaky. [STING: tiptoe]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: bluster] I tiptoe... the cake tiptoes too! [STING: whoosh]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: stunned] It’s rolling away from me! [STING: run]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: desperate] I chase it—WHAM! I trip! [STING: big_crash]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: devastated] The cake lands on my face. [STING: splat]

[BUTTON]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: loud, panicked] [PUNCHLINE]I can’t see! I’m wearing the cake! [/PUNCHLINE] [STING: villain_fail]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: gentle, wistful] Maybe... I should ask next time. [STING: sweet_pause]

[COVER: Melody stands cross-eyed with a giant chocolate cake smashed over their entire face, frosting dripping down.]
[PREMISE: Cake outsmarts a sneaky thief]
